description: Create a Stroop color-word experiment in PsychoPy Builder to measure cognitive interference. Participants see color words (red, green, blue) in different ink colors and must name the ink color. The experiment must include a routine named 'trial' that displays words from the 'text' column in colors from the 'letterColor' column and records keyboard responses (left, right, down) using the 'corrAns' column for correct answers. Configure a loop around the trial routine with 2 repetitions using the conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/stroop_conditions.csv. Use the response mapping: left=red, down=green, right=blue. Save the experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/stroop_experiment.psyexp.
